title: Infernal Spear
description: This mod adds the Infernal Spear from Sneak's Blueprints Projects
body:
This mods the Infernal Spear to Minecraft.

This spear adds a fire type spear to Minecraft.
Upon right clicking you will dash forward and leave a fire trail behind you.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3714ff7ae07b17c8cffcdf5f7fddabddae11e6e.png)

[![Use Code SNEAK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84bbfa52f61339ca16c130fd4727bf7358e6317a_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SNEAK)

Mod Developed by [Ethrocky](https://www.youtube.com/@TheCosmoCrewLIVE)
Model Made by [Sneak](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCu9rm_6d8mGXg9N0R-dToTQ)

Check out the video where this weapon was created:
